notebook_title: Relation-Conditioned Multimodal Learning for Semantic Representations

status_legend.LITERATURE_VERIFIED: Primary arXiv source exists; procedural mechanism described in abstract
status_legend.LITERATURE_PARTIAL: Paper exists; benchmark % not reproduced in agent-rules
status_legend.LITERATURE_UNSUPPORTED: No reproducible primary source for exact metric
status_legend.REPO_VERIFIED: Implemented or documented in agent-rules repository
status_legend.REPO_PARTIAL: Partial overlap; gap documented in RELATION_CONDITIONED_MAP.md
status_legend.SCOPE_EXCLUDED: Out of incorporation scope by PRD decision (model training)
